memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerAMS

briefdescription.para: Disconnect from AMS if already connected.
Check whether the websocket is currently connected to the AMS.

simplesect.para: true if it's connected, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: set a delegate to be triggered when successfully connect to AMS.
set a delegate to be triggered when error connecting to AMS.
set a delegate to be triggered when AMS connection is closed.
set delegate to be called when drain message is received. Only able to set one delegate. For multiple delegate, please refer to AddOnAMSDrainReceivedMulticastDelegate.
Add delegate that can be registered to multicast when drain message is received.
set DS session timeout to the new number given.

parameterdescription.para: new number for DS session timeout

briefdescription.para: reset DS session timeout to the one that already set in the fleet settings.
Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when an attempt to reconnect websocket has been done.
Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when connection is down & can't be reestablished. Longer than usual.
API for communication from dedicated server to AMS.
